en: Oh, for God's sake, I am trying to get some sleep.
I asked you to keep that dog quiet and instead you outfit him with a megaphone.
ko: 내가 그 개 조용히 하라고 했잖아. 대신에 메가폰을 달아주다니.

en: In the last 36 hours I haven't had so much as a nap and I've got to be back at the station by 2 a.m.
ko: 지난 36시간 동안 낮잠도 못 잤고, 새벽 2시까지 복귀해야 해.

en: By the time this day is up, one of us is going to sleep.
ko: 오늘이 끝날 때쯤, 우리 중 한 명은 잠을 잘 거야.

en: Oh, don't worry, Dr. Crane. I'll take Eddie for a walk.
And as far as your problem at work goes, if you want my opinion... Don't!
ko: 그리고 네 직장에서의 문제에 대해 내 의견이 필요하다면...

en: I had my share of women's opinions for the week between the station's new Reich's Chancellor and Rosa's incessant whining.
ko: 방송국의 새로운 라이히 총리와 로슬러의 끊임없는 불평으로 이번 주 여성의 의견은 충분히 들었어.

en: As far as I'm concerned, your entire sex can put a sock in it.
ko: 내 생각엔, 너희 성별은 조용히 해도 돼.

en: Boy, you never let me get away with a comment like that.
ko: 너는 그런 댓글을 내가 그냥 넘어가게 하지 않네.

en: Oh, even the best of us can get a bit cranky when we're overtired.
ko: 아, 우리 중 누구라도 피곤하면 좀 짜증날 수 있어.
